about.title: About
about.heading: About
about.description: This service allows regulators to manage their worklist items and organisations to manage their details and enrol in the EPR register.

regulator.title: Regulator
regulator.heading: Regulator Landing Page
regulator.description: This page is for regulators to manage their worklist items and view their details.

worklistItems.title: Worklist Items
worklistItems.heading: Worklist Items
worklistItems.description: This page is for regulators to view and manage their worklist items.

organisationList.title: Organisation List
organisationList.heading: Organisation List
organisationList.description: This page is for organisations to view their details and enrol in the EPR register.

operator.title: Operator Testing Flows Landing Page
operator.heading: Operator Testing Flows Landing Page
operator.description: This page allows test users to select the different flows for accreditation, registration and details.

operatorAccreditation.heading: Accreditation applications
operatorAccreditation.title: Accreditation applications
operatorAccreditation.applyForAnother: Apply for accreditation for another material
operatorAccreditation.errorLoading: Sorry, we are unable to load your accreditation applications. Please try again later.

materialSelection.title: Which material is this application for?
materialSelection.heading: Which material is this application for?

validation.selectMaterial: Select a material for this application
validation.fetchError: Sorry, there was a problem loading your applications. Please try again.
validation.createError: Sorry, we were unable to create your application. Please try again.

operatorRegistration.heading: Operator Registration
operatorRegistration.title: Registration
operatorRegistration.registerMustIf: You must register with your regulator if you either:
operatorRegistration.registerExportListInfo: export UK-sourced packaging waste for recycling
operatorRegistration.registerBeforeYou: Before you register, you need to be actively recycling or exporting the packaging waste material you are applying to be registered for.
operatorRegistration.registerOnceYouAre: Once you are registered, you can maintain this for future years by paying an annual charge and keeping your registration details up to date.
operatorRegistration.registerToMaintainRegistration: To maintain each registration you’ll  need to pay an annual charge by 30 September to maintain your active registrations for the next calendar year and keep your registration details up to date.

operatorDetails.title: Operator Details
operatorDetails.heading: Operator Details
operatorDetails.description: This page is the Operator Details Page.
